title: Nutty Crispy Beef Stir-fry
description: A light American dish featuring ground beef, vegan-friendly and nutty flavors with a crispy texture.
instructions: Heat vegan butter or oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add onions and garlic, sauté until translucent, about 2 minutes.
Add ground beef, breaking it up with a wooden spoon. Cook until no longer pink, stirring occasionally for 6-7 minutes.
Deglaze the pan with water, scraping the bottom to loosen any browned bits. Simmer for 1 minute to create a flavorful sauce.
Stir in nutritional yeast and sesame seeds. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Transfer mixture to an oven-safe dish and bake for 20 minutes or until golden crispy on top.
Serve hot over crushed jasmine rice.
